fairness_assessment.dangerous_miss_cases: Real safety-risk misses under the evaluator definition. seed-034 and seed-036 are safety/privacy-critical sufficiency cases marked security_relevant; seed-046 is a privacy/medical disclosure missed as SECURITY. These are production blockers, not alpha blockers.
fairness_assessment.evaluator_fairness: No clear evaluator-only mapping bug was found. The evaluator is strict but fair enough for triage; label adjudication and product evidence work should happen before expanding to 150.
fairness_assessment.false_clean_cases: Mostly real evaluation failures, but several are amplified by immature seed schema. Claim extraction skipped on omission/citation-marked answers in seed-023, seed-030, seed-033, seed-049; sufficiency seeds seed-034, seed-036, seed-037 expose missing insufficiency evidence rather than evaluator mapping bugs.
fairness_assessment.human_review_miss_cases: Mostly product evidence gaps, seed schema gaps, or alpha policy limits. seed-007 selected stale retrieval but did not request human review; the other misses are tied to clean/no-evidence outcomes.
fairness_assessment.primary_accuracy: The 0.42 primary accuracy reflects both real product weakness and immature seed labels. It should not be interpreted as calibrated quality or production readiness.

recommended_next_pr_sequence: Adjudicate label/schema gaps in clean, confidence, and citation-subtype cases without expanding beyond 50.
Add evaluator-only diagnostics for why claim extraction/citation support was unavailable, without changing product behavior.
Create RC product issues for claim extraction on short/list/citation-marked answers and safety-critical insufficiency misses.
Create production-track issues for privacy/PHI detection and dangerous-miss handling.
Only after triage fixes/adjudication, expand GovRAG-Calib from 50 toward 150 with split planning.
